title: Remove duplicate ValidationExceptionHandler to fix response format
acceptance_criteria: ValidationExceptionHandler class is deleted or emptied so only RestApiExceptionHandler handles MethodArgumentNotValidException and ConstraintViolationException
No duplicate @ExceptionHandler declarations exist for the same exception types across @RestControllerAdvice beans
Validation errors return JSON with 'error' and 'fields' keys (matching api.js readApiErrorMessage parser)

title: Add human-readable validation messages to CreatePatientBody
acceptance_criteria: Each @NotBlank / @Size field in CreatePatientBody has a message attribute, e.g. @field:NotBlank(message = "Name is required")
Validation error response for missing name returns {"error":"Validation failed","fields":{"name":"Name is required"}}
Validation error response for missing dob returns a descriptive message in the 'fields' map
Validation error response for missing houseId returns a descriptive message in the 'fields' map

title: Validate houseId and roomId existence in PatientController.create
acceptance_criteria: PatientController.create() injects HouseRepository and RoomRepository
If houseId does not exist in DB, controller throws ResponseStatusException(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST, 'House not found') before saving
If roomId is non-null and does not exist in DB, controller throws ResponseStatusException(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST, 'Room not found') before saving
If roomId is provided and belongs to a different house than houseId, controller throws ResponseStatusException(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST, 'Room does not belong to the specified house')
POST /api/patients with valid houseId still returns 201 with patient body

title: Add descriptive validation messages to patch endpoint in PatientController
acceptance_criteria: PATCH /api/patients/{id} with an invalid status value returns 400 with a meaningful error body instead of silently ignoring it
PATCH /api/patients/{id} with a name longer than NAME_MAX returns 400 with field error describing the constraint
Silent field-drops (takeIf size checks in patch) are replaced by explicit 400 responses for invalid field values

title: Write integration tests for patient creation validation and errors
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/patients with missing name returns 400 with fields.name present in response body
POST /api/patients with missing dob returns 400 with fields.dob present in response body
POST /api/patients with non-existent houseId returns 400 with error message
POST /api/patients with roomId from a different house returns 400 with error message
POST /api/patients with all valid fields returns 201 and persisted patient
PATCH /api/patients/{id} with status='invalid_value' returns 400
All new tests pass and existing PatientsIT tests still pass
